properties.Test Case: Try first-install startup by removing AppData/Local/SIL/BloomAlpha* (or whatever channel) and all your bloom collections. Run wizard that leads through making first collection. As a new user, you should be able to choose your UI language before going through any of the setup. Pick a language you can at least guess at an go through using that.
